data.title: Faraday X reveals groundbreaking products: FX Super One EAI-MPV, FF Super EAI F.A.C.E. System, FF EAI AI Agent. Company secured 10034 non-binding pre-orders for the Super One.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) unveiled the FX Super One MPV, the inaugural affordable mass-market EV from the FX brand. The California-based company, known for its global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem, celebrated this launch as a vital step and confirmed having received 10,034 binding deposits for non-binding pre-orders for the Super One. This model marks the beginning of a new product line for FF, signaling their commitment to accessible electric vehicles for customers worldwide.

data.title: Global Market Access for Medical Device Software Training Course will take place online on September 8-9, 2025. Professionals will gain insights into regulatory pathways with demand surging for Digital Health solutions.
data.description: A training course called "Global Market Access for Medical Device Software Training Course" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This course aims to provide comprehensive insights into various market access prerequisites for medical device software. With the increasing demand for Digital Health solutions globally, it is crucial for professionals to comprehend and maneuver through international regulations for successful market access. This course is designed to equip individuals with the necessary knowledge and skills to achieve success in this field.

data.title: Currency.com aims to scale smarter with AI for compliance. Turning to AI-native infrastructure for innovation.
data.description: In Jersey City, New Jersey on July 18, 2025, Currency.com, a leading global digital finance provider, announced plans to explore a strategic transition towards AI-native infrastructure. This move is aimed at enhancing the company's long-term goals of creating a more agile, adaptable, and secure platform. This new chapter of innovation signifies Currency.com's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements.

data.title: DP World delivers SailGP fleet to Port of Southampton ahead of Emirates Great Britain Sail Grand Prix event in Portsmouth on July 19-20.
data.description: Ahead of the Emirates Great Britain Sail Grand Prix event in Portsmouth on July 19-20, DP World, the Global Smart Logistics Partner of SailGP, has successfully transported the racing fleet into the Port of Southampton. The event is set to take place in Southampton, England, on July 18, 2025. DP World's strategic partnership with SailGP ensures the smooth handling and delivery of the racing fleet, highlighting their commitment to efficient logistics solutions in the marine industry. The delivery into Southampton marks a crucial step in the preparations for the upcoming Grand Prix event, where top sailors will compete in high-speed foiling catamarans.

data.title: Silobreaker aids NATO CCDCOE, releases report on cyber threats to maritime ports globally. #cybersecurity
data.description: A major security and threat intelligence technology company, Silobreaker, released news that the NATO Cooperative Cyber Defence Centre of Excellence (CCDCOE) has issued a new policy brief on the cybersecurity status of maritime port infrastructure in NATO and partner nations. This assessment, which included input from Silobreaker, highlights the challenges and best practices in this sector. The report is a collaborative effort involving industry experts and risk teams. This initiative showcases the importance of cybersecurity in port operations, with insights aimed at enhancing security measures.

data.title: Silver Storm Mining acquires Till Capital Corp in successful deal, via court-approved plan of arrangement.
data.description: TORONTO--Silver Storm Mining Ltd. has successfully acquired all of Till Capital Corporation's issued and outstanding common shares through a court-approved plan of arrangement. This acquisition was made possible as a wholly-owned subsidiary of Silver Storm combined with Till. Silver Storm is listed on the TSX.V as SVRS, OTCQB as SVRSF, and FSE as SVR, while Till is listed on the TSX.V as TILL. This acquisition marks a significant move in the mining sector, with the deal expected to have a profound impact on both companies' portfolios.

data.title: Kraig Labs (KBLB) to collaborate with ASEAN government agency for 3 years to expand spider silk production.
data.description: Kraig Labs, trading on OTCQB under the symbol KBLB, is currently in the final stages of negotiating a significant 3-year contract with a prominent government agency within the ASEAN region. This agreement aims to enhance and broaden the company's spider silk production capabilities.

data.title: Veritex Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: VBTX) reports Q2 2025 results and declares quarterly dividend.
data.description: Veritex Holdings, Inc., the holding company for Veritex Community Bank, disclosed its financial results for the quarter concluded on June 30, 2025, in Dallas on July 18, 2025. Trading under Nasdaq as VBTX, the company shared its earnings report for the mentioned period.

data.title: Ex-rugby player gets 2.5 years in US prison for $900K crypto mining Ponzi scheme.
data.description: Shane Donovan Moore, a former rugby player, has been handed a 2.5-year prison sentence in the United States for orchestrating a Ponzi scheme related to cryptocurrency mining. The scheme involved a total of $900,000.

data.title: Hungary faces short-term contraction as updated laws add crypto trading to criminal code; penalties for unlicensed exchanges.	Blockchain Hungary Association president views changes positively.
data.description: New laws in Hungary regarding cryptocurrency trading have raised concerns among experts, with the Blockchain Hungary Association suggesting that the domestic crypto market may be adversely affected. Kornél Kalocsai, president of the association, expressed approval of the revised criminal code during a conversation with Decrypt. The updated regulations entail consequences for engaging in unlicensed cryptocurrency exchanges, potentially impacting the market.

data.title: Azerbaijan's SWF to buy 49% of 402MW solar assets in Italy from Enfinity Global who will manage. Portfolio covers 14 plants.
data.description: The State Oil Fund of Azerbaijan (SOFAZ) has announced its plans to purchase a 49% ownership stake in a group of solar power plants in Italy. Enfinity Global will maintain a 51% majority stake in the portfolio and oversee long-term asset management. This collection comprises 14 solar power plants spread throughout the Lazio and Emilia-Romagna regions with a total capacity of 402 megawatts. The electricity generated by these plants is already contracted through agreements.

data.title: Smilegate and hololive English release "OVER//RIDE" OST for Chaos Zero Nightmare, performed by Mori Calliope and Nerissa Ravencroft. Available on major platforms.
data.description: A dynamic new soundtrack titled "OVER//RIDE" has been released, featuring a fusion of rock and metal genres. This collaborative project includes contributions from the talented hololive English members "Mori Calliope" and "Nerissa Ravencroft." The soundtrack is currently available for streaming on various platforms, such as CZN's official social media channels, Apple Music, and YouTube. Fans can now enjoy this unique musical creation across these popular platforms.
